title: Generated artifact frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of generated Markdown artifacts (compact runtime contracts under docs/runtime/agents/, harness adapters under .opencode/agents/ and .gemini/agents/, and generated session summaries). Codex TOML adapters under .codex/agents/ are generated by the same compiler and validated by lint-agent-contracts.sh.

name.description: Generated artifact name; for agent runtime contracts and adapters, this matches the canonical role slug

model.description: Configured model class or concrete harness model ID for adapters that consume this artifact; optional for compact runtime contracts

description.description: One-paragraph role description mirrored from the canonical's frontmatter; not authoritative (canonical_source remains canonical).

canonical_source.description: Path (project-relative) to the canonical input that produced this artifact

canonical_sha.description: Git blob SHA of the canonical source at generation time; lint compares this against the current canonical SHA and fails if stale or hand-edited

local_supplement.description: Optional project-local supplement path the harness should load after the canonical source

generator.description: Path of the generator script that produced this artifact

generator_version.description: Semver of the generator script at generation time

classification.description: Per Constitution III; this artifact is generated, not canonical. Lint rejects values other than `generated`.
